name: Cheese Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the juice from the pineapple and add water to make 2 cups. Heat until boiling.
2. Pour over the lemon-flavored gelatin and the unflavored gelatin softened in cold water. Stir until dissolved.
3. Add lemon juice and salt, then mix thoroughly.
4. Cool until partially set.
5. Add the mixture of pineapple with cream cheese, pimento, nuts, and celery.
6. Add marshmallows.
7. Fold in whipped cream.
8. Pour into a mold rinsed in cold water.
9. Let stand at room temperature for 12 hours.
